ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_code" TEXT /* Code for the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the portfolio */,
  "risk_profile" TEXT /* Risk profile of the portfolio */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES portfolio_manager ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the instrument */,
  "figi" TEXT /* FIGI (Financial Instrument Global Identifier) of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., Stock, Bond, ETF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the currency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the broker */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate of the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_status" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., MERC, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounting_methods" (
  "accounting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accounting method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the accounting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accounting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accounting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_transaction" (
  "instrument_transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument-transaction relationship */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_transaction_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_manager" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio manager */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio manager */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the portfolio manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_model" (
  "risk_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the risk model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stress_test" (
  "stress_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stress test */,
  "risk_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk model used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stress test */,
  "scenario" TEXT /* Scenario used for the stress test */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the stress test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stress_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stress_test_risk_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_model_id") REFERENCES risk_model ("risk_model_id")
)
